index works writings info search

web projects

scroll sideviews ➜ to view pictures!

doqmeat.com

(2023 - ongoing) my home on the internet. a personal website i started working on since april 2023 where i hand-code all the HTML and CSS. doing this has given me profound knowledge on how the basics of webdev work while also being an amazing creative outlet.

sepiarecord.net

(2026 - ongoing) a site for introducing my projects and eventual learning experience for PHP. currently a Work In Progress!

siinamota fansite

(2024 - ongoing) a fansite dedicated to my favorite vocaloid producer built with 11ty. a place to archive my album scans while also being accessible to other fans.

HTML templates & code bits

notebook

(2023) just a notebook!

yukika passport

(2024) an HTML template based off yukika's passport inclusion from her soul lady album. fun learning experience with CSS animations.

JS walkman mp3 player

(2025) a recreation of a sony walkman mp3 player from 2008. playable and everything!

commissions

status and info for HTML commissions can be found @ my Vgen profile

startastica

(2024) commissioned HTML templates for startastica
